payload.answer: No durable memory committed. The table appears to report run metrics: PPO-001 has Reward 012 and Sharpe 045 with note baseline; PPO-002 has Reward 018 and Sharpe 051 with note entropy tuned.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a small numeric results table with run identifiers and metrics, but no explicit user intent to store durable personal memory. Numeric values with leading zeros must be preserved exactly if referenced.

details: Processed table without normalizing numeric strings.
Preserved exact punctuation-sensitive numeric values with leading zeros.
No memory cards created because the content is experimental/tabular data rather than durable personal memory.
